records.descriptionEn: A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down. This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move, making it easy to capture and kill. As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom of the food chain itself.

partnerSkill.descriptionEn: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
